title: Things You Love
description: This mod adds talisman-like items, a wand and other random stuff
body:
This silly little mod adds 10 or so talisman-like items that have their unique abilities like:
- turning you into a ghost,
- dealing a lot of knockback,
- sending enemies flying into the air like a rocket,
- turning blocks into diamonds
and so on...

JEI is recommended for crafting recipes.

Have fun!
